description:
The IT department has received three warranty replacement laptops for devices LPT-ERR-01, LPT-ERR-02, and LPT-ERR-03 which experienced cascading motherboard failures. Retire the three defective assets by checking them in, setting their status to 'Retired', and appending 'RMA-9988' to their Notes field. For each retired asset, create a corresponding replacement asset using the same Model, Purchase Date, and Purchase Cost as the original unit. Use the following Asset Tags and Serial Numbers for the replacements:
- For LPT-ERR-01: Tag LPT-REP-01, Serial NEW-SN-01
- For LPT-ERR-02: Tag LPT-REP-02, Serial NEW-SN-02
- For LPT-ERR-03: Tag LPT-REP-03, Serial NEW-SN-03
Assign each new replacement asset to the user who was originally assigned the defective device it replaced.
